languages.text: Где-то там, впереди, ждал Патент и тот, кто дерзнул его украсть. И мы, Вольные Торговцы из династии фон Валанциус, были готовы на все, чтобы вернуть то, что было жаловано нам самим Богом-Императором.

The Warrant was there, somewhere ahead, along with the one who'd had the audacity to steal it. And we, the Rogue Traders of House von Valancius, were prepared to do anything to reclaim what had been granted to us by the God-Emperor Himself.
languages.original_text: Где-то там, впереди, ждал Патент и тот, кто дерзнул его украсть. И мы, Вольные Торговцы из династии фон Валанциус, были готовы на все, чтобы вернуть то, что было жаловано нам самим Богом-Императором.

traits.locale_text: The Warrant was there, somewhere ahead, along with the one who had possessed the audacity to steal it. And we, the Rogue Traders of House von Valancius, were prepared to do anything to reclaim what had been granted to us by the God-Emperor Himself.

The Warrant was there, somewhere ahead, along with the one who'd had the audacity to steal it. And we, the Rogue Traders of House von Valancius, were prepared to do anything to reclaim what had been granted to us by the God-Emperor Himself.

languages.text: 贸易授状就在前方某处，还有那胆敢窃取它的盗贼。而我们，冯·瓦兰修斯家族的行商浪人，已准备好不惜一切代价，夺回神皇亲赐于我族的圣物。
languages.original_text: The Warrant was there, somewhere ahead, along with the one who'd had the audacity to steal it. And we, the Rogue Traders of House von Valancius, were prepared to do anything to reclaim what had been granted to us by the God-Emperor Himself.

traits.locale_text: 贸易授状就在前方某处，还有那胆敢窃取它的盗贼。而我们，冯·瓦兰修斯家族的行商浪人，已准备好不惜一切代价，夺回神皇亲赐于我族的圣物。

languages.text: La Patente se encontraba más adelante, así como aquel que se había atrevido a robarla. Y nosotros, Comerciantes Independientes de la casa von Valancius, estábamos listos para hacer lo impensable para recuperar aquello otorgado por la gracia del Dios Emperador.
languages.original_text: The Warrant was there, somewhere ahead, along with the one who'd had the audacity to steal it. And we, the Rogue Traders of House von Valancius, were prepared to do anything to reclaim what had been granted to us by the God-Emperor Himself.

traits.locale_text: La Patente se encontraba más adelante, así como aquel que se había atrevido a robarla. Y nosotros, Comerciantes Independientes de la casa von Valancius, estábamos listos para hacer lo impensable para recuperar aquello otorgado por la gracia del Dios Emperador.

languages.text: La lettre de marque était là, à portée de main, au même titre que la personne ayant eu la suprême audace de la voler. Et en tant que libres-marchands de la maison von Valancius, nous étions prêts à tout pour récupérer ce qui nous avait été accordé par l'Empereur-Dieu en personne.
languages.original_text: The Warrant was there, somewhere ahead, along with the one who'd had the audacity to steal it. And we, the Rogue Traders of House von Valancius, were prepared to do anything to reclaim what had been granted to us by the God-Emperor Himself.

traits.locale_text: La lettre de marque était là, à portée de main, au même titre que la personne ayant eu la suprême audace de la voler. Et en tant que libres-marchands de la maison von Valancius, nous étions prêts à tout pour récupérer ce qui nous avait été accordé par l'Empereur-Dieu en personne.

languages.text: Ruhsatname oradaydı, ileride bir yerde. Onu çalma cüretini gösteren kişi de yanındaydı. Von Valancius Hanesi Hür Tacirleri olarak Tanrı İmparator'un bizzat bize bahşettiği şeyi geri almak için her şeyi yapmaya hazırdık.
languages.original_text: The Warrant was there, somewhere ahead, along with the one who'd had the audacity to steal it. And we, the Rogue Traders of House von Valancius, were prepared to do anything to reclaim what had been granted to us by the God-Emperor Himself.

traits.locale_text: Ruhsatname oradaydı, ileride bir yerde. Onu çalma cüretini gösteren kişi de yanındaydı. Von Valancius Hanesi Hür Tacirleri olarak Tanrı İmparator'un bizzat bize bahşettiği şeyi geri almak için her şeyi yapmaya hazırdık.

languages.text: Der Handelsbrief war dort irgendwo. Genau wie der Dieb, der die Kühnheit hatte, ihn zu stehlen. Und wir, die Freihändler des Hauses von Valancius, waren bereit, alles zu tun, um zurückzuholen, was uns der Gottimperator Selbst gewährt hatte.
languages.original_text: The Warrant was there, somewhere ahead, along with the one who'd had the audacity to steal it. And we, the Rogue Traders of House von Valancius, were prepared to do anything to reclaim what had been granted to us by the God-Emperor Himself.

traits.locale_text: Der Handelsbrief war dort irgendwo. Genau wie der Dieb, der die Kühnheit hatte, ihn zu stehlen. Und wir, die Freihändler des Hauses von Valancius, waren bereit, alles zu tun, um zurückzuholen, was uns der Gottimperator Selbst gewährt hatte.

languages.text: その証書は、どこか先にある。そして、それを盗むという大胆さを持ち合わせた者も。我々は、フォン・ヴァランシウス家のならず者たち。神皇帝自身によって授けられたものを取り戻すために、何だってする覚悟だった。
languages.original_text: The Warrant was there, somewhere ahead, along with the one who had possessed the audacity to steal it. And we, the Rogue Traders of House von Valancius, were prepared to do anything to reclaim what had been granted to us by the God-Emperor Himself.

traits.locale_text: その証書は、どこか先にある。そして、それを盗むという大胆さを持ち合わせた者も。我々は、フォン・ヴァランシウス家のならず者たち。神皇帝自身によって授けられたものを取り戻すために、何だってする覚悟だった。
